title: Garlicky Fluffy Saudia Squid Stir-fry
description: A delicious and unique twist on the traditional Saudi squid dish featuring a tangy peanut sauce, crispy squid, and a sprinkle of fresh cilantro for an authentic yet modern touch.

ingredients.name: A handful of fresh cilantro, chopped

instructions: Rinse the squid tentacles under cold water and pat them dry with paper towels.

Season the squid with salt on both sides. Heat a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat, add oil if needed, then place the seasoned squid in the pan. Stir-fry until they turn golden brown, about 5-7 minutes.
Add minced garlic and red onion to the wok, stir for another minute, allowing them to soften slightly.
Pour in soy sauce and rice vinegar, reduce the heat to low, then add ground cumin to the sauce. Continue stirring until it thickens into a glaze.
Remove the squid from the pan and let cool on a plate. Add spring onions to the wok and stir for another minute.
Gently fold in the cooled squid along with chopped fresh cilantro, ensuring everything is evenly distributed.
